item.title: Student Loans will INCREASE under Trump presidency. See the receipts below.
item.description:
Hmm…let’s see if this checks out…
Hmm, sounds even worse than it did mere seconds ago. Some of the language of this sounds reasonable, but it’s a bit of a bait and switch. For more details on how this could play out…this gives more insight into the plan. https://www.americanprogress.org/article/project-2025-would-increase-costs-block-debt-cancellation-for-student-loan-borrowers/
item.dc:creator: pixelpatron

item.title: 55 years ago today humans first landed and stepped on the moon. Carl Sagan’s reflections on that momentous event still resonate to current events today…
item.dc:creator: MustHailSagan

item.title: You look like you need an uplifting dump, I got you (Saturday Wholesome Dump of Positivity)
item.description:
1. Their mischievous faces when they tricked the parents
2. He knew she couldn’t, so he did it for her ?
3. Truly are
4. Usually not the best of timings, but the bride was cool with it
5. Maybe not as wholesome as other videos, but so satisfying
6. The gang gets shot
7. Dragon kites
8. If this video doesn't get you in good mood nothing will (Sound ON)
9. Anti-poachers take selfie with gorillas they are protecting
10. Men in Love
11. Cookie lady eats a cookie
12. Now that's a smooth transition
13. She nailed it actually
14. Further proof that cats are liquid
15. And finally I would like to share with this awesome community my passion project. Me and my brother have started working on games in the past few years. From scratch basically and we learned how to do it on our own. Today I'm proud to say our third game is close to release. It's inspired by the "The Stanley Parable" (same kinda of style and humor) and it would mean the world to us if you wishlisted on Steam. Check out the page here: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/ I wish you all success in your personal passion projects! It's a blast to work on one :)))
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: I built a low-poly Sephiroth cosplay. It's my first attempt at making a costume out of EVA foam!
item.description:
Masamune sword was 3D printed and painted, the rest was cut out of EVA foam. Total build time was about 6 months during my spare time after work.
Instagram Credit: Low Poly Sephiroth: @mepirate001 Aerith: @closer.kae Photo: @alive_alf
item.dc:creator: ReveriePM

item.title: Mais Bien Sûr...
item.description: Merci beaucoup Imgurian! But I believe it is you that is font (pardon the expression) of entertainment! None the less, thank you for the Accolade. May your hands forever be clean no matter what.....✨ Ah Imgurian, 'Une main lave l'autre, non?' That is the saying, yes? We all benefit when we cooperate! So please accept my sincere thanks for the most excellent Accolade, and may you always maintain a clean fresh scent!✨ Désolé Imgurian! I have overslept! Thank you for being patient with my laziness. Truly if the roles were reversed, I would wait for you too. Please continue to be awesome in this weary world. Thank you for the Accolade.✨ Bonjour Imgurian! Tell me, qu'est-ce que ça fait, to be so amazing? Never a Blue Monday with you! You are perfect, clean or dirty. Thank you for the Accolade!✨
item.dc:creator: HorrorMango

item.title: Hey imgur, I want to share the ups and downs of my weight loss journey
item.description:
I've posted about my weight loss here years ago, but I thought I'd give an update. Here I was in my 20s. It's one of the only pictures I have of myself back then. I was deeply depressed, in a toxic relationship, and on the fast track to diabetes. When I wasn't working, I was glued to the screens, eating fast food, snacking constantly, and downing 5-7 cans of soda/pop a day. I live in America and with our heathcare system I knew soon I could be deeply in debt with health problems.
In my 30s, I decided to change my life. I got out of my home situation, which led to a change in diet and exercise. I stopped snacking, had no fast food, no pop, and cut my meals in half. I started taking walks in the nearby forest nature trails and discovered it gave my mind the peace I needed, so I fell in love with being surrounded by nature. I lost about 100 lbs in one year. The weight just came off so fast, I never had a goal because I never actually thought I'd be able to lose weight.
Here I am just got in my 40s. I, once again, embraced a change in my life. Got offered a new job and moved states away from everyone I know and love. I had been going to the gym constantly over the past 5 years because I had noticeably started putting weight back on, but I was still gaining weight. My problem was definitely my diet. This picture was from October 2023. I started a high protein, very low to no sugar/carb diet with vegetables every day. It was hard to say no to new co-workers offering food, but I stayed strong.
It took time, but I've lost almost 40 lbs since I started. I look like I'm in the best shape of my life. Back around March, I started having bad cramps every time I needed to go to the bathroom. I thought it could have been my diet. Maybe I have too much protein? Maybe it's just me getting old. It progressively got worse. The pain was too much to ignore. By June, it was time for a colonoscopy. I wasn't expecting the doctor to automatically tell me the bad news. Colon cancer. Only a week later, I was in surgery to remove 10in of my intestines along with the tumor threatening to block up the works. Recovery was the worst experience and most pain I've ever been in. In what was removed, they found cancer had spread to a lymph node. I was stage 3. Chemo highly recommended.
Here I am with my first round of chemo. Every 2 weeks for the next 6 months I have 4hrs of chemo and carry around my little fanny pack of poison for 2 days. I've already experienced previews of the side effects that, from what I've been told, will only get worse as I get into the thick of it. I'm trying to stay very optimistic and positive throughout this whole experience, and Imgur has helped me get through this, so I hope that my story will help even just one person out there. If you don't think you can lose weight, you can! If you don't think you can get through the thing, you can! Personally, I like to say- With a positive attitude and a great set of tits, you can do anything! Thank you for reading all this and get those preventive screenings!!!
item.dc:creator: juniejunicorn
